source: web search aggregation - EDP (Energy Distribution Partners) subsidiaries
notes: Small roll-up operator. Individual branded subsidiaries are typically single- or dual-location operators. Barrett (AZ), Sullivan (PA), Cetane name disambiguation below.

locations.name: Barrett Propane - Prescott
locations.notes: Serves Yavapai County quad-cities area since 1960; single-location operator

locations.name: Sullivan Oil & Propane - Bath
locations.notes: Headquartered in Bath, PA; 15 employees; serves Lehigh Valley and Poconos; acquired by EDP Oct 2024 (41st acquisition)

disambiguation.Cetane Propane: No operating propane distributor named 'Cetane Propane' found. 'Cetane Associates' (1177 W. Loop S, Suite 1650, Houston, TX 77027, ph 860-592-0089) is an M&A advisory / business broker for propane & delivered fuels industry — NOT a distributor. Should be removed from market map.
